## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce team members and align on company vision, culture, and expectations for GrowthX's rapid growth phase.](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has experienced explosive growth, going from 4 to 18 clients and $40K to $160K monthly revenue in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Company aims to be truly AI-native, disrupting the $4T services industry by applying AI to all aspects of work](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Core values emphasized: asynchronous communication, continuous learning, raising the bar, and obsessive attention to detail](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Team expanded from 3 to 11 full-time employees plus 25 contractors in 3 months, with a focus on hiring top talent](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Vision

  - [Started 5-6 months ago with AI workflow workshops](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [First client signed April 26, now at 18 clients](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Revenue grew from $30-40K to $160K+ monthly in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Aiming to disrupt $4T services industry, $300B sales/marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Strong product-market fit with quick client sign-ons (e.g., Reddit, RAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Company Culture and Expectations

  - [Asynchronous communication and thorough documentation crucial](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Continuous learning mentality expected from all team members](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Everyone responsible for raising the bar and improving processes](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Obsessive attention to detail ("OCD to the max") in all work](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Building trust through going above and beyond for clients](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Open-door policy for feedback and addressing concerns](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Team Expansion and Hiring

  - [Grew from 3 to 11 full-time employees in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Added 20 contract providers and 5 designers](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Focused on hiring top talent, particularly in SEO](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### AI Integration and Innovation

  - [Applying AI to client services and internal workflows](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Encouraging creativity and idea-sharing for AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Building automation and technology to support work](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Client Relations

  - [Emphasis on becoming indispensable to clients](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Proactively identifying ways to add value (e.g., cost savings for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Treating client relationships as extensions of their teams](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Team Introductions

  - [Brief introductions from team members, including backgrounds and motivations](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Diverse team with members from various countries (Sri Lanka, India, Pakistan, Kenya, Macedonia, Serbia)](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share detailed documentation on company vision and processes](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Continue focus on standardizing work methods and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Encourage team to identify improvement opportunities and share ideas](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Plan for potential future in-person team meetup (Portugal suggested as a location)](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
  - [Support ongoing skill development, particularly in AI and workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/PNTF8HsjyzFyZEwgT1Sx3jkJRnoqtK1M?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
